The '''G-1 starfighter''' was a vessel created through a joint venture between [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] [[BullbaBong]] and the [[Theed Palace Space Vessel Engineering Corps/Legends|Theed Palace Space Vessel Engineering Corps]].

==Characteristics==
These [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] were designed to function solely in the [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] star system and as such they possessed limited [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrives]] and instead focused the remaining systems on weapons and [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]]. Visually, they resembled the [[N-1 starfighter/Legends|N-1 starfighter]], but were painted forest green. They were designed to maintain operations for long periods at a time and were quite independent.

==History==
Though owned by the [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] [[Royal House of Naboo/Legends|government]], some of these fighters did get into the open market and in the hands of private owners.
